sentences.target: Heute sehe ich einen hellen Stern über dem Dach.
sentences.reading: /ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈzeːə ɪç ˈaɪ̯nən ˈhɛlən ʃtɛʁn ˈyːbɐ deːm dax/

translations.de: Heute sehe ich einen hellen Stern über dem Dach.
translations.ipa: /ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈzeːə ɪç ˈaɪ̯nən ˈhɛlən ʃtɛʁn ˈyːbɐ deːm dax/
translations.en: Today I see a bright star above the roof.
translations.es: Hoy veo una estrella brillante sobre el techo.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, je vois une étoile brillante au-dessus du toit.
translations.it: Oggi vedo una stella luminosa sopra il tetto.
translations.ko: 오늘 지붕 위에 밝은 별이 보여요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我看到屋顶上方有一颗明亮的星星。
translations.yue: 今日我喺屋頂上面見到一粒好光嘅星。
translations.ru: Сегодня я вижу яркую звезду над крышей.
translations.pt: Hoje vejo uma estrela brilhante sobre o telhado.
translations.he: היום אני רואה כוכב בהיר מעל הגג.
translations.tr: Bugün çatının üzerinde parlak bir yıldız görüyorum.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi thấy một ngôi sao sáng trên mái nhà.
translations.ar: اليوم أرى نجمة لامعة فوق السطح.
translations.nl: Vandaag zie ik een heldere ster boven het dak.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я бачу яскраву зірку над дахом.
translations.hu: Ma egy fényes csillagot látok a háztető felett.
translations.hi: आज मुझे छत के ऊपर एक चमकीला तारा दिख रहा है.
translations.pl: Dziś widzę jasną gwiazdę nad dachem.
translations.el: Σήμερα βλέπω ένα φωτεινό αστέρι πάνω από τη στέγη.
translations.nb: I dag ser jeg en lys stjerne over taket.
translations.id: Hari ini aku melihat bintang terang di atas atap.
translations.sv: I dag ser jag en ljus stjärna ovanför taket.
translations.ro: Astăzi văd o stea strălucitoare deasupra acoperișului.
translations.cs: Dnes vidím jasnou hvězdu nad střechou.
translations.da: I dag ser jeg en lys stjerne over taget.
translations.fi: Tänään näen kirkkaan tähden katon yläpuolella.
translations.ja: 今日は屋根の上に明るい星が見える。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb situating the event in time; occupies the sentence-initial frame (can be the Vorfeld).
Finite main verb: 1st person singular, present indicative; predicates the action of the clause.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; functions as the subject of 'sehe'.
Indefinite article, masculine accusative singular; marks the direct object noun 'Stern'.
Attributive adjective, weak declension (-en) after determiner; agrees with masculine accusative singular 'Stern'.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular as the direct object of 'sehe'.
Preposition; here indicates static location and governs the dative ('dem Dach').
Definite article, dative singular neuter; agrees with 'Dach' as object of 'über'.
Common noun, neuter; dative singular as complement of the preposition 'über' (static location).

sentences.target: Ich tippe auf den Stern in der App.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈtɪpə aʊ̯f deːn ʃtɛʁn ɪn deːɐ ɛp/

translations.de: Ich tippe auf den Stern in der App.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈtɪpə aʊ̯f deːn ʃtɛʁn ɪn deːɐ ɛp/
translations.en: I tap the star in the app.
translations.es: Toco la estrella en la aplicación.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在应用里点一下星星。
translations.yue: 我喺應用程式入面撳個星星。
translations.ru: Я нажимаю на звёздочку в приложении.
translations.pt: Eu toco na estrela no aplicativo.
translations.vi: Tôi chạm vào ngôi sao trong ứng dụng.
translations.ar: أنا أضغط على النجمة في التطبيق.
translations.nl: Ik tik op de ster in de app.
translations.uk: Я натискаю на зірку в застосунку.
translations.hi: मैं ऐप में तारे पर टैप करता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg trykker på stjernen i appen.
translations.id: Aku mengetuk ikon bintang di aplikasi.
translations.sv: Jag trycker på stjärnan i appen.
translations.da: Jeg trykker på stjernen i appen.
translations.ja: アプリで星をタップする。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb: 1st person singular, present indicative; governs a prepositional complement with 'auf'.
Preposition; as part of the verb-preposition construction 'tippen auf', it governs the accusative.
Definite article, accusative singular masculine; marks 'Stern' as the object of the preposition 'auf'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'auf' (accusative).
Preposition; indicates location and governs the dative in 'in der App'.
Definite article, dative singular feminine; agrees with 'App' as object of 'in' (location).
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'in' (dative, location).

sentences.target: Mama backt einen Stern aus Teig.

translations.de: Mama backt einen Stern aus Teig.
translations.en: Mom is baking a star out of dough.
translations.es: Mamá está horneando una galleta en forma de estrella.
translations.fr: Maman cuit un biscuit en forme d'étoile.
translations.it: Mamma sta cuocendo un biscotto a forma di stella.
translations.ko: 엄마가 별 모양 쿠키를 굽고 있어요.
translations.ru: Мама печёт печенье в форме звезды.
translations.pt: Minha mãe está assando um biscoito em forma de estrela.
translations.tr: Annem yıldız şeklinde bir kurabiye pişiriyor.
translations.vi: Mẹ đang nướng bánh quy hình ngôi sao.
translations.ar: أمي تخبز قطعة بسكويت على شكل نجمة.
translations.nl: Mama bakt een koekje in de vorm van een ster.
translations.uk: Мама пече печиво у формі зірки.
translations.hi: मम्मी सितारे के आकार का बिस्कुट सेंक रही हैं.
translations.pl: Mama pie ciasteczko w kształcie gwiazdy.
translations.el: Η μαμά ψήνει μπισκότο σε σχήμα αστεριού.
translations.nb: Mamma baker en kjeks formet som en stjerne.
translations.id: Mama sedang memanggang kue berbentuk bintang.
translations.ro: Mama coace un biscuit în formă de stea.
translations.cs: Máma peče sušenku ve tvaru hvězdy.
translations.da: Mor bager en småkage formet som en stjerne.
translations.ja: ママが星形のクッキーを焼いている。

tokens.explanation: Kinship term used as a common noun; nominative singular subject of the clause.
Finite main verb: 3rd person singular, present indicative; takes a direct object and a material PP with 'aus'.
Indefinite article, masculine accusative singular; marks 'Stern' as direct object.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular as direct object of 'backt'.
Preposition; indicates material/source and governs the dative.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as complement of 'aus' (material).

sentences.target: Der Lehrer zeichnet einen Stern an die Tafel.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ ˈleːʁɐ ˈtsaɪ̯çnət ˈaɪ̯nən ʃtɛʁn an diː ˈtaːfl̩/

translations.de: Der Lehrer zeichnet einen Stern an die Tafel.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ ˈleːʁɐ ˈtsaɪ̯çnət ˈaɪ̯nən ʃtɛʁn an diː ˈtaːfl̩/
translations.en: The teacher draws a star on the board.
translations.es: El profesor dibuja una estrella en la pizarra.
translations.fr: Le professeur dessine une étoile au tableau.
translations.it: L'insegnante disegna una stella alla lavagna.
translations.zh-Hans: 老师在黑板上画一颗星星。
translations.yue: 老師喺黑板上畫一粒星。
translations.pt: O professor desenha uma estrela no quadro.
translations.vi: Giáo viên vẽ một ngôi sao lên bảng.
translations.nl: De leraar tekent een ster op het bord.
translations.hu: A tanár csillagot rajzol a táblára.
translations.hi: अध्यापक बोर्ड पर एक सितारा बनाते हैं.
translations.el: Ο δάσκαλος σχεδιάζει ένα αστέρι στον πίνακα.
translations.nb: Læreren tegner en stjerne på tavla.
translations.id: Guru menggambar sebuah bintang di papan tulis.
translations.sv: Läraren ritar en stjärna på tavlan.
translations.ro: Profesorul desenează o stea pe tablă.
translations.da: Læreren tegner en stjerne på tavlen.
translations.ja: 先生が黒板に星を描いている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular masculine; marks subject noun 'Lehrer'.
Common noun, masculine; nominative singular subject of the clause.
Finite main verb: 3rd person singular, present indicative; takes a direct object and a directional PP.
Indefinite article, masculine accusative singular; marks 'Stern' as direct object.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular direct object of 'zeichnet'.
Preposition; indicates direction toward a surface and governs the accusative with motion ('an die Tafel').
Definite article, accusative singular feminine; agrees with 'Tafel' as object of 'an' (direction).
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as complement of 'an' indicating the goal ('onto the board').
